note: Per-asset economics. reports[] = actual monthly earnings; rentalIncomeUsd is the protocol's OWN share of that month's rental in USD (the operator's cut is never shown). Monthly reserves accrue over calendar time: amortization = value*amortRateAnnualPct/100/12, insurance = insuranceAnnual/12. Net to RWT Engine (this month) = rentalIncomeUsd - amortization - insurance; net annual yield = net*12/value. amortWallet = on-chain USDC reserve, read live.
